close_reason: ShardMetadata FlatBuffer, shard_key/shard system keys, and ShardRouter consistent hashing are implemented. Log assignment computed via golden ratio (not stored). Parents/object_storage_prefix deferred to future work.
description: Everything shard-aware needs the shard identity structure and system key schema. Deliverables: Shard identity (id, range, born_at, parents, log_assignment, object_storage_prefix), system keys for shard map, metadata shard bootstrap, shard-to-log routing. BLOCKERS: (1) Metadata distribution broken - finalization.ex:402 has no-op merge_fn that discards all metadata updates, (2) Tag system is static (hardcoded 0,1 in initialization_phase.ex), (3) No ShardIdentity struct - only StorageTeamDescriptor which lacks genealogy/log_assignment, (4) Log assignment not persisted in system keys. Partial foundations exist: StorageTeamDescriptor, range_tag type, log-to-tag mapping in finalization.
title: Shard Definition and System Keys
